---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, improvement, or extension to the project
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- A one or two sentence description of the feature you're proposing. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what gap does it fill?
     e.g. "Currently the classifier only detects two fault types, making it inadequate for pump cavitation scenarios." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.
     Be as specific as you can — pseudocode, diagrams, or references are welcome. -->

## Affected Component

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] ML / predictive maintenance pipeline
- [ ] Python Snap7 data logger
- [ ] PLC logic (TIA Portal)
- [ ] Factory I/O scene / simulation
- [ ] WinCC HMI
- [ ] Dataset / fault library
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution preferred? -->

## References

<!-- Links to papers, similar implementations, Siemens documentation, or prior art that support this idea. -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this myself
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to pick up

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else the maintainers should know. -->
